center.name: Little Rann of Kutch
center.summary: Little Rann of Kutch是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括白肩雕，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The eastern imperial eagle (Aquila heliaca) is a large bird of prey that breeds in southeastern Europe and extensively through West and Central Asia

links.evidence: The eastern imperial eagle (Aquila heliaca) is a large bird of prey that breeds in southeastern Europe and extensively through West and Central Asia
